chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI I.A. No.58 of 2020 (Zafar Khan v. Mateenuddin Khan & another) Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Nazir Report dated 31.8.2021 2. For hearing of CMA No.1636/2021 3. For orders on Nazir Report dated 02.4.2021 4. For hearing of CMA No.856/2021 5. For hearing of CMA No.2185/2020 6. For orders on office objection a/w reply at ‘A’ 7. For orders on CMA No.2186/2020 8. For hearing of main case 9. For hearing of CMA No.2187/2020 14.5.2024 Learned Counsel for Appellant sought time for preparation on 27.3.2023 followed by his absence on 21.12.2023 and 04.3.2024. Today also the position is same. There is no intimation either. Appeal is dismissed for non- prosecution along with all pending applications, if any. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
